channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Return to US-Iran hostilities is huge setback for civilians,…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Return to US-Iran hostilities is huge setback for civilians, UN rights chief says reut.rs/458hktv
item.content:encoded: Return to US-Iran hostilities is huge setback for civilians, UN rights chief says reut.rs/458hktv

item.title: Norway oil service workers end strike, industry group says r…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Norway oil service workers end strike, industry group says reut.rs/4gyHIE3
item.content:encoded: Norway oil service workers end strike, industry group says reut.rs/4gyHIE3

item.title: The price of crude oil on global markets continues to surge,…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: The price of crude oil on global markets continues to surge, with international oil benchmark Brent rising for a second straight day to more than $87 per barrel, the first time since June it has traded at that price.
item.content:encoded: The price of crude oil on global markets continues to surge, with international oil benchmark Brent rising for a second straight day to more than $87 per barrel, the first time since June it has traded at that price.

item.title: The biggest US grid operator is about to learn how tight pow…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: The biggest US grid operator is about to learn how tight power supplies may get in coming years as the data-center boom sparks unprecedented electricity demand growth.
item.content:encoded: The biggest US grid operator is about to learn how tight power supplies may get in coming years as the data-center boom sparks unprecedented electricity demand growth.

item.title: The police in Canada said on Monday that they had found seve…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The police in Canada said on Monday that they had found several hundred firearms while searching the home of a former conservative lawmaker, Inky Mark. He was charged with offenses including firearm trafficking.
item.content:encoded: The police in Canada said on Monday that they had found several hundred firearms while searching the home of a former conservative lawmaker, Inky Mark. He was charged with offenses including firearm trafficking.

item.title: President Trump reverses course on charging 20% fee on ships…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: President Trump reverses course on charging 20% fee on ships moving through Strait of Hormuz. Follow live updates. https://cnn.it/4f1Wthr
item.content:encoded: President Trump reverses course on charging 20% fee on ships moving through Strait of Hormuz. Follow live updates. https://cnn.it/4f1Wthr

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [9話]ヒトナー - 屋宜知宏 | 少年ジャンプ＋ ヒトナー 屋宜知宏 <隔週水曜更新>ケモノが…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[9話]ヒトナー - 屋宜知宏 | 少年ジャンプ＋

ヒトナー 屋宜知宏 <隔週水曜更新>ケモノが住む最果ての星に一人の地球人が訪れる。獣人たちは初めて目にする"ヒト"の姿に揺れ動く。異種族交流の中で変化するケモ社会・・・『アイアンナイト』、『レッドスプライト』の屋宜知宏が描くハートフル異種族観察物語!! [JC1巻9/4発売予定]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[9話]ヒトナー - 屋宜知宏 | 少年ジャンプ＋

ヒトナー 屋宜知宏 <隔週水曜更新>ケモノが住む最果ての星に一人の地球人が訪れる。獣人たちは初めて目にする"ヒト"の姿に揺れ動く。異種族交流の中で変化するケモ社会・・・『アイアンナイト』、『レッドスプライト』の屋宜知宏が描くハートフル異種族観察物語!! [JC1巻9/4発売予定]

item.title: BREAKING: ICE orders officers to stop pursuing people in veh…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: BREAKING: ICE orders officers to stop pursuing people in vehicles after fatal shootings in Maine and Texas, according to a current senior DHS official and two former senior DHS officials.
item.content:encoded: BREAKING: ICE orders officers to stop pursuing people in vehicles after fatal shootings in Maine and Texas, according to a current senior DHS official and two former senior DHS officials.

item.title: The Pitbull effect: bald guy summer is here – and it’s sexy,…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: The Pitbull effect: bald guy summer is here – and it’s sexy, single and ready to mingle
item.content:encoded: The Pitbull effect: bald guy summer is here – and it’s sexy, single and ready to mingle

item.title: Thomson Reuters agrees to sell a 51% stake in its legal and …
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Thomson Reuters agrees to sell a 51% stake in its legal and tax publishing business to KKR for $500M, but will keep editorial control of its content portfolio (Hannah Miller/Bloomberg)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Thomson Reuters agrees to sell a 51% stake in its legal and tax publishing business to KKR for $500M, but will keep editorial control of its content portfolio (Hannah Miller/Bloomberg)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com "The Graham Platner saga should…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

"The Graham Platner saga should not distract from a fact that is bigger than any one candidate: The uprising against the Democratic establishment is coming from the voters, and it cannot be contained," Mara Gay writes.
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

"The Graham Platner saga should not distract from a fact that is bigger than any one candidate: The uprising against the Democratic establishment is coming from the voters, and it cannot be contained," Mara Gay writes.

item.title: A new survey, conducted by Zogby Analytics, tested head‑to‑h…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: A new survey, conducted by Zogby Analytics, tested head‑to‑head contests between Republican and Democratic figures.
item.content:encoded: A new survey, conducted by Zogby Analytics, tested head‑to‑head contests between Republican and Democratic figures.

item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)

item.content:encoded: NEW: E. Jean Carroll collects more than $5 million from Trump 3 years after a jury found him liable for sexual abuse and defamation.

item.title: JUST IN: President Trump dropped the idea of charging a 20% …
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: JUST IN: President Trump dropped the idea of charging a 20% fee ‌on all cargo shipped through the Strait of Hormuz, and said he would instead take trade and investment deals with the Gulf states reut.rs/4f2FY4R
item.content:encoded: JUST IN: President Trump dropped the idea of charging a 20% fee ‌on all cargo shipped through the Strait of Hormuz, and said he would instead take trade and investment deals with the Gulf states reut.rs/4f2FY4R

item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: President Donald Trump backed away from his plan to impose a 20% charge on cargo shipments through the Strait of Hormuz. Listen to that and the latest stories on Bloomberg News Now.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump backed away from his plan to impose a 20% charge on cargo shipments through the Strait of Hormuz. Listen to that and the latest stories on Bloomberg News Now.

item.title: A grandfather who was tossed 8 feet into the air by a rampag…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A grandfather who was tossed 8 feet into the air by a rampaging bison at Yellowstone National Park is expected to recover from his injuries, his family tells NBC News.
item.content:encoded: A grandfather who was tossed 8 feet into the air by a rampaging bison at Yellowstone National Park is expected to recover from his injuries, his family tells NBC News.

item.title: New York City officials were conducting safety inspections o…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: New York City officials were conducting safety inspections of construction sites across the city this week after a building in Midtown Manhattan became dangerously unstable last week, forcing construction to be halted at the project.
item.content:encoded: New York City officials were conducting safety inspections of construction sites across the city this week after a building in Midtown Manhattan became dangerously unstable last week, forcing construction to be halted at the project.

item.title: President Trump backed away from his plan to impose a 20% ch…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: President Trump backed away from his plan to impose a 20% charge on cargo shipments through the Strait of Hormuz after the proposal was widely panned as impractical.
item.content:encoded: President Trump backed away from his plan to impose a 20% charge on cargo shipments through the Strait of Hormuz after the proposal was widely panned as impractical.

item.title: Warren Buffett didn’t give anything to the Gates Foundation …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Warren Buffett didn’t give anything to the Gates Foundation this year, instead directing nearly $6 billion in shares of Berkshire Hathaway to four foundations related to his own family.
item.content:encoded: Warren Buffett didn’t give anything to the Gates Foundation this year, instead directing nearly $6 billion in shares of Berkshire Hathaway to four foundations related to his own family.

item.title: Spotify launches a Talk to Spotify feature that lets users c…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Spotify launches a Talk to Spotify feature that lets users create playlists and more, rolling out in beta to Premium users 18+ in the US, Ireland, and Sweden (Steve Dent/Engadget)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Spotify launches a Talk to Spotify feature that lets users create playlists and more, rolling out in beta to Premium users 18+ in the US, Ireland, and Sweden (Steve Dent/Engadget)

item.title: ICE agents have been directed to largely suspend vehicle sto…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: ICE agents have been directed to largely suspend vehicle stops until further notice following recent deadly shootings in Maine and Texas, source says. Follow live updates. https://cnn.it/4feMKmW
item.content:encoded: ICE agents have been directed to largely suspend vehicle stops until further notice following recent deadly shootings in Maine and Texas, source says. Follow live updates. https://cnn.it/4feMKmW

item.title: In the week since the body of teenager Nolan Wells was found…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: In the week since the body of teenager Nolan Wells was found off Mississippi’s Horn Island, investigators have revealed little about how he died, leaving social media speculation to fill the void.
item.content:encoded: In the week since the body of teenager Nolan Wells was found off Mississippi’s Horn Island, investigators have revealed little about how he died, leaving social media speculation to fill the void.

item.title: British counter-terrorism police said that former government…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: British counter-terrorism police said that former government minister Ann Widdecombe, who was found murdered at her home last week, was clearly targeted, adding that officers were still working to establish the motive reut.rs/4bBR2n5
item.content:encoded: British counter-terrorism police said that former government minister Ann Widdecombe, who was found murdered at her home last week, was clearly targeted, adding that officers were still working to establish the motive reut.rs/4bBR2n5

item.title: #🔖世の中 アルツハイマー病の原因、「銅を含む薬」で42％減少 | ギズモード・ジャパン 記憶や思考、行動に問題が起…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
アルツハイマー病の原因、「銅を含む薬」で42％減少 | ギズモード・ジャパン

記憶や思考、行動に問題が起きる脳の病気、アルツハイマー病。これは認知症の原因の約7割を占めるともいわれます。 治療を目指して実験室でさまざまな研究が試みられているなか、オーストラリアのモナッシュ大学から明るいニュースが届きました。 研究チームが、銅を含む化合物「Cu（ATSM、銅（II）ジアセチルビス（N⁴-...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
アルツハイマー病の原因、「銅を含む薬」で42％減少 | ギズモード・ジャパン

記憶や思考、行動に問題が起きる脳の病気、アルツハイマー病。これは認知症の原因の約7割を占めるともいわれます。 治療を目指して実験室でさまざまな研究が試みられているなか、オーストラリアのモナッシュ大学から明るいニュースが届きました。 研究チームが、銅を含む化合物「Cu（ATSM、銅（II）ジアセチルビス（N⁴-...

item.title: In this deviation from a Caprese salad, slices of heirloom t…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: In this deviation from a Caprese salad, slices of heirloom tomatoes are topped with dollops of cottage cheese and layered with red onions, olive oil and tender herbs, plus a savory spice blend inspired by everything bagels. nyti.ms/4wJb4V6
item.content:encoded: In this deviation from a Caprese salad, slices of heirloom tomatoes are topped with dollops of cottage cheese and layered with red onions, olive oil and tender herbs, plus a savory spice blend inspired by everything bagels. nyti.ms/4wJb4V6

item.title: The Democrats seeking to take Graham Platner’s place as the …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: The Democrats seeking to take Graham Platner’s place as the party’s Senate nominee in Maine share something in common: They all made unsuccessful bids for higher office this year.
item.content:encoded: The Democrats seeking to take Graham Platner’s place as the party’s Senate nominee in Maine share something in common: They all made unsuccessful bids for higher office this year.

item.title: Chinese AI pioneer DeepSeek has begun preparations for an in…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
Chinese AI pioneer DeepSeek has begun preparations for an initial public offering and may file as soon as this year, setting the stage for what could be a landmark debut for the country’s technology industry. Read our exclusive story: bloom.bg/4ykJUFp

📷: Andrey Rudakov/Bloomberg
item.content:encoded:
Chinese AI pioneer DeepSeek has begun preparations for an initial public offering and may file as soon as this year, setting the stage for what could be a landmark debut for the country’s technology industry. Read our exclusive story: bloom.bg/4ykJUFp

📷: Andrey Rudakov/Bloomberg

item.author: Fox News - Breaking News Updates | Latest News Headlines | Phot… (@foxnews.com.web.brid.gy)
